text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Die Cramerischen Herren Erben und Gebrüader Philibert, Buchführere in Genff, proponiren dem Publico Subscriptions-Weis, eine neue Edition von <BIBL><AUTHOR>M. T. Ciceronis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Operibus, cum Delectu Commentariorum à <AUTHOR>Josepho dOlivet</AUTHOR></TITLE>, in schön Pappier mit neuer Schrifft, von St. Augustini Text und Garamondi Noten; in conformität der Pariser Edition sehr correct heraus zugeben, und versprechen solches von allen darinn sich befindlichen Fehleren zu reinigen etc. das gantze Werck, welches in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> <VOLUME>9. Volumina</VOLUME> haltet, solle die Herren Praenumeranten nicht mehr als <PRICE>67 Livres Französische Valuta</PRICE> oder <PRICE>40. Francken Genffer-Geld</PRICE> kosten etc. das weitere kan aus dem Project und Aviso bey Herrn Onoffrio Hoffmann allhier ersehen werden.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":9,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. Encoding artifacts (√ª, √∫, √†, √∂, √§, √≤, Í∙õ) replaced with proper Unicode characters: 'ü', 'ü', 'à', 'ö', 'ä', 'o' (superscript), and 'etc.' respectively.
2. 'Ciccronis' corrected to 'Ciceronis' (typo with double 'c').
3. 'M. T.Ciccronis' spacing fixed to 'M. T. Ciceronis'.
4. The mismatched tag pair <PRIZE>...</PRICE> (first occurrence) corrected to <PRICE>...</PRICE> for consistency.
5. The second <PRIZE> tag corrected to <PRICE> to match its closing tag and maintain consistency.
6. The 'cum Delectu Commentariorum à Josepho dOlivet' portion restructured so that the nested <AUTHOR> tag for 'Josepho dOlivet' is placed inside the <TITLE> element, which better reflects the bibliographic structure (editor within title context).
7. 'Publico' and 'Subscriptions-Weis' spacing normalized (removed erroneous line break/concatenation).
8. '4t√≤' corrected to '4to' (quarto format abbreviation).
9. 'Frantz√∂sische' corrected to 'Französische'."}

parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Die Cramerischen Herren Erben und Gebrüader Philibert, Buchführere in Genff, proponiren dem Publico Subscriptions-Weis, eine neue Edition von <BIBL><AUTHOR>M. T. Francken Genffer-Geld</PRICE> kosten etc. das weitere kan aus dem Project und Aviso bey Herrn Onoffrio Hoffmann allhier ersehen werden.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
The following corrections were made:
1. Encoding artifacts (√ª, √∫, √†, √∂, √§, √≤, Í∙õ) replaced with proper Unicode characters: 'ü', 'ü', 'à', 'ö', 'ä', 'o' (superscript), and 'etc.' respectively.
2. 'Ciccronis' corrected to 'Ciceronis' (typo with double 'c').
3. 'M. T.Ciccronis' spacing fixed to 'M. T. Ciceronis'.
4. The mismatched tag pair <PRIZE>...</PRICE> (first occurrence) corrected to <PRICE>...</PRICE> for consistency.
5. The second <PRIZE> tag corrected to <PRICE> to match its closing tag and maintain consistency.
6. The 'cum Delectu Commentariorum à Josepho dOlivet' portion restructured so that the nested <AUTHOR> tag for 'Josepho dOlivet' is placed inside the <TITLE> element, which better reflects the bibliographic structure (editor within title context).
7. 'Publico' and 'Subscriptions-Weis' spacing normalized (removed erroneous line break/concatenation).
8. '4t√≤' corrected to '4to' (quarto format abbreviation).
9. 'Frantz√∂sische' corrected to 'Französische'.
